calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA GAMBLING CONTROL COMMISSION, BUREAU OF GAMBLING CONTROL DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION.

Respondent's demurrer to the verified petition is sustained without leave to amend as to the first cause of action and overruled as to the second and third causes of action. Petitioners bring claims related respondent the California Gambling Control Commission's ("Commission") administration and interpretation of the Gambling Control Act, Business & Professions Code, 19800 et seq. ("GCA.") (Subsequent citations are to the Business & Professions Code unless otherwise noted.)

(see word minutes for complete ruling)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
